indexStyle:
<style>
:root {
  --bg-gradient-start: #f9fafc;
  --bg-gradient-end: #eef1f5;
  --card-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  --text-primary: #1e293b;
  --text-secondary: #475569;
  --border-light: #e2e8f0;
  --accent: #006b75;
}
[data-theme="dark"] {
  --bg-gradient-start: #0b1a24;
  --bg-gradient-end: #14242f;
  --card-bg: rgba(22,36,48,0.85);
  --text-primary: #e9edf0;
  --text-secondary: #b4c6d0;
  --border-light: #2e4050;
  --accent: #58a6b5;
}
.profile-header {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: 2.5rem;
  padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
.post-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(330px, 1fr));
  gap: 2rem;
}
.post-card {
  background: var(--card-bg);
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: 2rem;
  padding: 1.8rem;
  transition: all 0.25s;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
.post-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px);
  border-color: var(--accent);
}
.date-badge {
  background: #1f883d;
  color: white;
  padding: 0.3rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 40px;
}
.tag {
  background: var(--tag-bg, #eef2f6);
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  padding: 0.25rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 40px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
}
</style>
title: tl小站
subTitle: tl小站

P2.description: 我的爱人正在逆向进化。

P4.description: 11岁的时候，他喜欢上教他国文的女老师，老师25岁，有一对黑眼珠和深深的酒窝。
